Yet another plagerized gorilla tag knockoff. This game blatantly steals most, if not all assets from og gorilla tag. You can tell by other user reviews as well that the "developer" (if you can call them that based on all the copy pasted assets and functions) is not good at moderating/utilizing a team. Examples are the very obvious lack of communication or discipline among the moderators and the "developer". Save yourself the time and just go play the real gorilla tag.

I met a moderator and I said “Why aren’t my cosmetics showing up” he said “Cuz your dumb” like bruh, fr rn? And started banning everyone with the name (gorilla) for example, Gorilla6378, Banned, Gorilla5689, Banned, and forced everyone with the name Gorilla to change their name for NO REASON, the only thing I came here for is because I suck at Gorilla Tag so I wanted it to be my training wheels, but the moderators SUCK,
